author: akudlay-ru
description: Manage Markdown structure as a tree: move branches, change heading levels, fold sections, renumber outlines, export branches, and navigate long notes. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Structure Commander
manifest.description: Управление Markdown-структурой и порядком заметок/папок vault: ветки, уровни, сворачивание, перенумерация, экспорт, боковая панель, сохранение выделения при переносе.
manifest.name: Structure Commander

name: Structure Commander

releases.author: Akudlay-ru
releases.name: Structure Commander v2.3.4

releases.author: Akudlay-ru
releases.description:
Structure Commander 2.3.1

Fixes:
- Fixed moving selected text.
- Selection no longer loses one selected line after repeated move operations.
- Whole-line selections are restored correctly after moving up or down.
releases.name: Structure Commander 2.3.1

releases.author: Akudlay-ru
releases.description:
Structure Commander 2.3.0

Changes:
- Improved structure context menu.
- Added compact "Show to" submenu with real document heading levels.
- Added "Show all" action for full expansion.
- Improved hotkey visibility in menus and toolbar.
- Improved structure panel behavior and navigation.
- Fixed branch movement behavior for folded branches and selections.
releases.name: Structure Commander 2.3.0

releases.author: Akudlay-ru
releases.description:
Initial public release of Structure Commander.

Features:
- Move Markdown branches up and down.
- Promote and demote headings, text, and lists.
- Fold and unfold current branches or the whole document.
- Show document structure up to selected heading level.
- Renumber headings and lists.
- Export current branch to a separate Markdown file.
- Structure side panel and editor toolbar.

[main.js](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/27257303/main.js)
[manifest.json](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/27257305/manifest.json)
releases.name: Structure Commander 2.2.2
